name: The Great American Cheat
overview: Dennis Jr. is the embodiment of typical Brazilian trickery. In his first days back in Garoa City, his older brother Franklin tries to set him on the right path. However, Dennis still gets involved with a secret gang, while trying to hide his actions from his mother, Dona Bella, as she is suspicious of his antics.

trailers.title: O Grande Trapaceiro Americano | Teaser Oficial (uma série inspirada em GTA)
